```
(config)# hostname <name>

(config)# no ip domain-lookup

(config)# enable secret <password>

(config)# line con 0 OR (config)# line vty <start numb> <end num>
(config-line)# password <passwd>
(config-line)# login

(config)# service password-encryption

(config)# banner motd #<message>#

(config)# int <int type><num>/<num> OR (config)# int vlan <num>
(config-if)# ip add <network> <subnet>
(config-if)# desc <desc>
(config-if)# no shut (not required for vlan)

# sh run
# sh ip int b

#erase startup-configuration
#del vlan.dat (Only for switches)
#reload
```
